title: onosma kurdica
intro: Onosma kurdica, also known as Kurdish onosma, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Onosma kurdica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
